# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This is an Astro-based portfolio website optimized for recruiter conversion.

## Project Overview
- **Framework**: Astro 5.x with TypeScript (strict mode)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS (dark theme, professional design)
- **Content**: Content Collections for case studies in Markdown
- **Target**: Senior AWS/Python contract roles

## Architecture Principles
- Static-first with minimal client-side JavaScript
- Semantic HTML for accessibility
- SEO-optimized with proper meta tags, OpenGraph, and sitemap
- Clean, premium design with lots of whitespace
- Strong typography and high contrast for readability

## Code Style
- Use TypeScript strict mode
- Prefer Astro components over client-side frameworks
- Keep components small and focused
- Use Tailwind utility classes consistently
- Follow accessibility best practices (ARIA labels, semantic HTML, keyboard navigation)

## Content Structure
- Case studies in `/src/content/case-studies/` as Markdown files
- Each case study should include: title, description, client, role, tech stack, date, and featured flag
- Focus on measurable business results and technical depth
